# Digital Rock Modeling

**Summary**: Simulating fluid flow through digital representations of rock pore networks.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] applied digital rock modeling to determine the connectivity and percentage of pore networks in various compaction models.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Digital rock modeling allowed for the simulation of permeability across three directions (X, Y, Z) for 15 different scenarios. ([[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025, p. 92]])
